title: US names six crew killed in refuelling plane crash in Iraq
summary_full: The aircraft was on a combat mission as part of ongoing US operations against Iran when it crashed in western Iraq on Thursday.
summary_public: The aircraft was on a combat mission as part of ongoing US operations against Iran when it crashed in western Iraq on Thursday.
